creator: kickitover@riseup.net
text:
Hi,

x11-toolkits/fltk requires the build host to have groff installed to build the man pages for the pkg.  Edited build log below:

building for: FreeBSD direwolf.anarchadelic. 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT amd64
maintained by: danfe@FreeBSD.org

Poudriere version: 3.1.99.20170322

Jail OSVERSION: 1200030
Job Id: 04

--MAKE_ENV--
XDG_DATA_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/fltk/work  XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/fltk/work  HOME=/wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/fltk/work TMPDIR="/tmp" NO_PIE=yes MK_DEBUG_FILES=no MK_KERNEL_SYMBOLS=no SHELL=/bin/sh NO_LINT=YES PREFIX=/usr/local  LOCALBASE=/usr/local  LIBDIR="/usr/lib"  CC="cc" CFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -march=bdver2  -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing"  CPP="cpp" CPPFLAGS="-isystem /usr/local/include"  LDFLAGS=" -fstack-protector" LIBS="-L/usr/local/lib"  CXX="c++" CXXFLAGS="-O2 -pipe -march=bdver2 -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include"  MANPREFIX="/usr/local" BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM="install  -s -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_LIB="install  -s -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_SCRIPT="install  -m 555"  BSD_INSTALL_DATA="install  -m 0644"  BSD_INSTALL_MAN="install  -m 444"

====>> Cleaning up wrkdir

!!! build failure encountered !!!

Following diff allows the build to complete:

Index: x11-toolkits/fltk/Makefile
===================================================================
--- x11-toolkits/fltk/Makefile  (revision 440908)
+++ x11-toolkits/fltk/Makefile  (working copy)
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@

 LICENSE=       LGPL20

+BUILD_DEPENDS= nroff:textproc/groff
 LIB_DEPENDS=   libpng.so:graphics/png

 USES=          jpeg localbase pkgconfig


Thanks.
